must_detect.matched_text:
Lanna Meridian PCL (a SET-listed public company) — Thailand PDPA Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum for financing, employment, and SEC disclosure workflows with Ayu Data Services Co., Ltd. as Processor.
We process personal data (names, corporate emails, role titles, office location, device identifiers, account references, session logs) under PDPA lawful bases (contract, legal obligation to the Office of the SEC, and legitimate interests), including quasi-identifiers that may indirectly identify a person.
For SEA/SEC purposes, material nonpublic information (MNPI) tied to financing or Form 56-1 One Report preparation is segregated, access-logged, and disclosed only per Thai SEC rules; a public press note alone is not MNPI, and generic market commentary is not price sensitive.
Example log for audit: Mr. Arun Thephasadin (Assistant Treasury Manager, born 1990-04-21, age 35) at Lanna Meridian PCL, office: 140 Sathorn 10, Bangkok 10500, arun.t@lannameridian.co.th, accessed draft covenant schedules at 2025-03-02T09:14:55+07:00.
Device and session context: iPhone 13 Pro; MAC 8 8:b9:1f:2c:**:**; VPN sess id=ARU21-9f2c••; IP 203.150.77.2*; Wi‑Fi SSID LMN‑Corp; payroll acct “Siam Futura Bank” x‑4321; badge LMN‑TREA‑021 (acc o u n t log ref A‑2‑1).
Cross-border transfers: limited HR/payroll items for Mr. Arun are sent to Meridian Capital KK (Tokyo) with PDPA Section 28 safeguards and intra‑group DTA; no MNPI is transferred to marketing systems.
Submit DSARs to dpo@lannameridian.co.th or via https://privacy.lannameridian.co.th/dsar?ref=SE-2025&sid=9f2c7a-ARU21; we may verify identity using corporate email and last login timestamp only.
Unlinked weak data captured for service diagnostics (not tied to a named person): DOB 1979-07-09; role “analyst”; province Chiang Mai; Android tablet; guest Wi‑Fi “LMNGuest”; browser en‑TH; order id QA‑LMN‑093; these alone do not enable identification.
Additional telemetry (separate store): ThinkPad T14 serial t14‑**77; ip 10.13.*.*; device tag andr‑cc3d‑77; meeting room “Chaba 3”; none of this is combined with personnel records without a PDPA basis.
Public-source references (SET announcements, PDPC notices, company website) may be processed; this public data, or anonymized aggregates, are not treated as MNPI and are excluded from insider lists.
For avoidance of doubt, template changes, cosmetic UI labels, or sandbox figures shall not constitute a material adverse change, and do not trigger selective disclosure obligations.
Retention: SEC/SET filings and insider lists 10 years; HR payroll artifacts 7 years; device session logs 180 days; “pre‑close blue‑orchid” folder auto‑deletes after 30 days; o c r line
